Magothy River · Chesapeake Bay

Sail into golden hour on the Chesapeake

Cast off from the Magothy River and glide out onto open water as the sun drops behind the Bay Bridge. A private sunset sail aboard the Kadima!, a 45' Hylas yacht, captained by Elliot Nudell.

Explore the voyage
The Course

One river out, one bay of sunset

Depart Magothy River Boarding & cast-off
Chesapeake Bay Bridge Sail beneath the spans
Baltimore Light Open-bay sunset
Return to Magothy Dockside under stars
On The Water

Golden light on the Bay

Real sunsets from real sails out of the Magothy and across the Bay.

Sail Aboard Kadima

Your Captain & Vessel

Captain Elliot Nudell, aboard the Kadima!

Elliot Nudell has sailed the Chesapeake for years and knows exactly where the Bay puts on its best light. He'll handle the helm so you can settle in, relax, and watch the sky change color over the water.

The Kadima! is a 45' Hylas sail yacht — spacious, stable, and built for comfortable open-water cruising, with plenty of deck space to take in the view from every angle.

Vessel
Kadima!

45' Hylas
